gherkin:
When the user clicks on the "Override" tile on the dashboard
And the user clicks on the "Playback" tab
And the user either search for select an override playback that needs to be edit
And the user clicks on the "Edit Override" pencil button
And the user edits the information in "OktaId"
And the user edits the information in "Client Type" in the dropdown
And the user edits the information in "Experience" in the dropdown
And the user edits the information in "Features" in the dropdown
And the user clicks on the "Save" button
Then the user should land on the Session page by default
And the user should land on the Playback page
And the user should see "Search" box on the right side of the screen
And the user should see the "Update Override" modal on the screen
And the user should see the edited entered information in "OktaId"
And the user should see the edited entered information in "Client Type" in the dropdown
And the user should see the edited entered information in "Features" in the dropdown
And the user should see a successful message "Session Override successfully updated"
!xray-attachment://3a478799-76bc-4e75-8903-fb70eefec2f1|width=292,height=41!

steps.action:
*When* the user clicks on the "Override" tile on the dashboard

*And* the user clicks on the "Playback" tab

*And* the user either search for select an override playback that needs to be edit

*And* the user clicks on the "Edit Override" pencil button

*And* the user edits the information in "OktaId"

*And* the user edits the information in "Client Type" in the dropdown

*And* the user edits the information in "Experience" in the dropdown

*And* the user edits the information in "Features" in the dropdown

*And* the user clicks on the "Save" button
steps.result:
*Then* the user should land on the Session page by default

*And* the user should land on the Playback page

*And* the user should see "Search" box on the right side of the screen

*And* the user should see the "Update Override" modal on the screen

*And* the user should see the edited entered information in "OktaId" 

*And* the user should see the edited entered information in "Client Type" in the dropdown

*And* the user should see the edited entered information in "Features" in the dropdown

*And* the user should see a successful message "Session Override successfully updated"

!xray-attachment://3a478799-76bc-4e75-8903-fb70eefec2f1|width=292,height=41!
